ops.title: hook-tests red on main: CommandLine.splice ValueError in guard rewrite for eval-prefixed commands
ops.description: CI job hook-tests (capt-hook pack test plugin) fails on main since 3581bc37 (evt.command_line → evt.cmd.line migration): rewrite_command_occurrences splices 'ccx format -- …' into CommandLine(raw='eval gh pr list --json number') and captain_hook's CommandLine.splice raises ValueError('replacement at index 1 does not survive its enclosing quote layers'). Same traceback on 3581bc37's own run 29715144997 and on f18e537's run 29715221142 (anchor rename — exonerated). Last green: 3634f0d5. Repro: uvx --isolated 'capt-hook>=11.0.0' pack test plugin. Likely fix in plugin/capt-hook/hooks/ccx_repipe_rewrites.py: skip or re-quote rewrites inside eval's quote layer.

ops.text: uvx --isolated capt-hook pack test plugin exits 0 locally and the hook-tests CI job is green on main
